platform: Nordic nRF54-series KiCad reference design adaptation
project_domain: space-constrained BLE wearable PCB adaptation, RF-section preservation, and low-power mixed-signal layout
key_features: Reference-design adaptation in KiCad, sensor swap, I2C peripheral + LED addition, board-to-flex connectors, thin mechanical envelope routing, USB-C + Li-ion charging integration, RF keepout preservation, manufacturable handoff outputs
milestone_1_desc: Reference design audit, block pruning, and schematic modification plan
milestone_2_desc: Schematic updates: sensor swap, I2C peripheral, LED, flex connectors, and charging path
milestone_3_desc: Mechanical-envelope PCB placement and routing with RF keepout protection
milestone_4_desc: Final DFM pass and manufacturing package (Gerber, drill, BOM/PnP, STEP, source)
